name: founding-story
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman with silver-streaked hair, expression shifted to something like recognition. Not warm, but acknowledging. Sovereignty uniform, Commandant insignia. Cool blue-white transport lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: You chose the future over someone who couldn't follow you there. That's the Sovereignty's founding story. That's the story of everyone on this transport.

name: permission
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman leaning back slightly in her seat, giving Sera space. Expression offering something — permission, absolution. Silver-streaked dark hair, sharp features softened slightly. Cool blue-white lighting from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: The grief doesn't go away. You just learn to use it as fuel for building something that outlasts it.

name: absolution
prompt: Close-up on young brunette woman's face. Receiving permission. Absolution for a choice she hadn't finished making. Eyes glistening slightly but not crying. Expression raw, open, accepting. Soft warm bokeh beginning to intrude on cool blue background — transformation starting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: armor-sliding
prompt: Medium shot. Young brunette woman seated against viewport, posture straightening. Something shifting — the first layer of armor sliding into place. Not numbness, not denial. A choice. Dark fitted attire with tech accents. Cool blue-white lighting, but her expression hardening with purpose. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
